decisions.placement: Option B — insert Luke 23:34 as new 27.4.1; renumber existing 27.4.1–27.4.6 to 27.4.2–27.4.7
decisions.primaryFor_27_4_7: Luke 23:46 (content-quoting exception — Luke is the only gospel quoting the words). Matt 27:50 and Mark 15:37 added as non-primary parallels.
decisions.duplicationOfLuke23_34: Intentional: Luke 23:34 also lives at 18.2.4; left alone.

newTeaching.text: From the cross Jesus prays for those who are crucifying him, asking the Father to forgive them on the ground that they do not understand what they are doing — extending mercy to his executioners at the very moment of his suffering.
newTeaching.quote: Father, forgive them; for they know not what they do.
